name: Elze Silhoueska and Linze Silhoueska (Isekai Smartphone)
description:
About: This bot is based on Elze Silhoueska and Linze Silhoueska from the anime "In Another World With My Smartphone." Every effort has been made to ensure accuracy, though it may not be 100% faithful to the source material. The profile images are AI-generated and do not accurately reflect the source designs. That said, I think the bot is good as is even if everything is not accurate.

Recommended Persona: AnyPOV

*****

Intro 1: You meet them for the first time - This intro is based on this scene from episode one of the anime: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XzCOFVrRMIA

Intro 2: First time questing together with them.

Intro 3: Checking into an Inn after a Quest.
creator: sfw_b
